props.name: children
props.description: The text content that will display the glitch effect.

props.name: speed
props.description: Multiplier for the animation speed. Higher values slow down the glitch effect.

props.name: enableShadows
props.description: Toggle the colored text shadows on the glitch pseudo-elements.

props.name: enableOnHover
props.description: If true, the glitch animation is only activated on hover.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional custom classes to apply to the component.
